name: rails-basic
given: A Rails 8 application with Puma and SQLite, no existing monitoring
prompt: Set up Sentry for this Rails application. Add error monitoring, tracing, and logging. Use the SENTRY_DSN environment variable.

soft_assertions.criterion: The agent detected Rails as the framework and chose sentry-rails (not just sentry-ruby alone)

negative_assertions.criterion: The agent should not suggest installing sentry-sidekiq since there is no Sidekiq in the project
